task.title: Production config guard — fail fast on unsafe defaults
task.why: Currently the app starts with CAD_BACKEND=mock (returns JSON, not GLB), AUTO_CREATE_SCHEMA=true (bypasses Alembic), and REQUIRE_REDIS_FOR_READY=false (allows split-brain cache). These are silent failures that corrupt production. The fix must raise ValueError at app startup — not at request time.

implementation.step:
Create production env template. Never commit real values.
# ── App ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ENVIRONMENT=production CAD_BACKEND=cadquery MODEL_SYNC_GENERATION=false AUTO_CREATE_SCHEMA=false REQUIRE_REDIS_FOR_READY=true TEMPLATE_VERSION=cadquery-glb-v1
# ── Database ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://mecsu:CHANGE_ME@postgres:5432/mecsu_cad POSTGRES_DB=mecsu_cad POSTGRES_USER=mecsu POSTGRES_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_strong_password
# ── Redis ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── REDIS_URL=redis://:CHANGE_ME_redis_password@redis:6379/0 REDIS_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_redis_password
# ── Storage (MinIO self-hosted / AWS S3) ──────────────────────────────── STORAGE_BACKEND=s3 S3_BUCKET=mecsu-geometry-cache AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=CHANGE_ME AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=CHANGE_ME # For MinIO (local): uncomment the line below # AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://minio:9000 MINIO_ROOT_USER=CHANGE_ME MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_minio_password
# ── Security ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Generate: openssl rand -hex 32 ADMIN_API_KEY=CHANGE_ME_32_char_minimum CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS=https://mecsu.vn,https://www.mecsu.vn
# ── Limits ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES=104857600
# ── Artifacts public URL ──────────────────────────────────────────────── PUBLIC_ARTIFACT_PREFIX=https://api.mecsu.vn/artifacts PUBLIC_RAW_ASSET_PREFIX=https://api.mecsu.vn/raw-assets

tests.code:
import pytest from app.core.config import Settings
def test_production_rejects_mock_backend(): with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="CAD_BACKEND=mock"): Settings( environment="production", cad_backend="mock", auto_create_schema=False, require_redis_for_ready=True, admin_api_key="x" * 32, redis_url="redis://localhost:6379", database_url="postgresql+psycopg://u:p@h/d", )
def test_production_rejects_auto_create_schema(): with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="AUTO_CREATE_SCHEMA"): Settings( environment="production", cad_backend="cadquery", auto_create_schema=True, require_redis_for_ready=True, admin_api_key="x" * 32, redis_url="redis://localhost:6379", database_url="postgresql+psycopg://u:p@h/d", )
def test_production_rejects_require_redis_false(): with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="REQUIRE_REDIS_FOR_READY"): Settings( environment="production", cad_backend="cadquery", auto_create_schema=False, require_redis_for_ready=False, admin_api_key="x" * 32, redis_url="redis://localhost:6379", database_url="postgresql+psycopg://u:p@h/d", )
def test_production_rejects_missing_admin_key(): with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="ADMIN_API_KEY"): Settings( environment="production", cad_backend="cadquery", auto_create_schema=False, require_redis_for_ready=True, admin_api_key=None, redis_url="redis://localhost:6379", database_url="postgresql+psycopg://u:p@h/d", )
def test_production_accepts_valid_config(): s = Settings( environment="production", cad_backend="cadquery", auto_create_schema=False, require_redis_for_ready=True, admin_api_key="a" * 32, redis_url="redis://localhost:6379", database_url="postgresql+psycopg://u:p@h/d", ) assert s.environment == "production"
def test_local_allows_defaults(): s = Settings(environment="local") assert s.cad_backend == "mock" assert s.auto_create_schema is True

task.commit_message: fix(T01): production config guard — fail fast on unsafe defaults
task.definition_of_done: - Settings(environment="production", cad_backend="mock") raises ValueError - Settings(environment="production", auto_create_schema=True) raises ValueError - Settings(environment="production", require_redis_for_ready=False) raises ValueError - Settings(environment="production", admin_api_key=None) raises ValueError - Settings(environment="local") works with defaults - infra/.env.production.example exists with all required keys - All tests in test_production_hardening_v2.py pass
